detail.description: Otto Kemp flies out to right fielder Will Benson.
Otto Kemp pops out to second baseman Spencer Steer.
Otto Kemp grounds out, second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Spencer Steer.
Otto Kemp flies out to right fielder Spencer Steer.
Otto Kemp flies out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
Otto Kemp lines out to third baseman Austin Riley.
Otto Kemp grounds into a force out, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Justin Crawford out at 2nd. Otto Kemp to 1st.
Otto Kemp lines out to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
Otto Kemp flies out to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
Otto Kemp lines out sharply to right fielder James Wood.
Otto Kemp singles on a fly ball to right fielder James Wood. Edmundo Sosa to 3rd.
Otto Kemp grounds out, second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger.
Otto Kemp singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Otto Kemp pops out to first baseman Rafael Devers.
Otto Kemp grounds out, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers.
